name: Lumivara — intake-email
_notes: Reference template for Phase 2 of the admin portal.
Import into n8n, then: (1) set IMAP credential on the 'Watch requests@ mailbox' node
(account 'requests@lumivara.ca' or whichever address you forwarded to the IMAP host),
(2) set the Anthropic credential on 'Structure with Claude',
(3) set the GitHub credential on 'Create GitHub Issue',
(4) set the SMTP credential on 'SMTP auto-reply'.
Allow-list senders by editing the 'Allow-list sender' filter — defaults to lumivara.ca + the admin allowlist.
The original email body is stored verbatim in the issue so the AI cannot silently rewrite the source of truth.

parameters.title: ={{ $json.title }}

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $node["Watch requests@ mailbox"].json.subject }}
parameters.html:
Thanks — we’ve logged your request. You can track progress in your dashboard:

Open the dashboard →

Tracking: {{ $json.html_url }}

name: Lumivara · Admin · Intake (email)

messages.content: You are an issue-structurer for the Lumivara admin portal. Take the client's raw email and produce JSON with {title, body, suggestedLabels[]}. Always include the raw email under '## Original request'.

parameters.subject: Re: ={{ $('Allow-list + normalise').item.json.title }}
parameters.html:
Got it. We're reviewing your request.
